arts.ttl: Juventus refuse to give up on Tomori: New approach planned after Supercoppa
arts.sum: Juventus remain determined in their pursuit of AC Milan defender Fikayo Tomori, despite recent setbacks. The Bianconeri had laid solid groundwork for a deal before the Supercoppa Italiana semi-final in Riyadh, which Milan won in a comeback victory. Juventus Sporting Director Cristiano Giuntoli had structured a potential €20 million transfer for the 27-year-old, involving a two-year loan with an obligation to buy. The post Juventus refuse to give up on Tomori: New approach planned after Supercoppa appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Frattesi’s future away from Inter: Roma top choice
arts.sum: Davide Frattesi's time at Inter Milan appears to be drawing to a close, with the midfielder actively seeking a move away from the club. arts.ttl: Milan in talks with RB Leipzig for Noah Okafor transfer
arts.sum: Noah Okafor's time at AC Milan may be coming to an end as the club engages in negotiations with RB Leipzig regarding a potential transfer. The Swiss forward, who has struggled to make a significant impact this season, scoring only one goal in 550 minutes across 16 appearances, is viewed as a surplus by the Rossoneri's management.
